subcodes.first_line: This is the immortal Leaf which hath stirred in the paradise of the Tablet, assuming the form of words, and from its movements doth manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه ورقه الخلد قد تحرک فی فردوس اللوح علی هیئه الکلمات و یظهر من اطوارها و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
